seeds.value: Secret rotation: every 90 days. TLS minimum: 1.2. No public-facing Redis or databases. All API endpoints require authentication. Principle of least privilege for all service accounts.
seeds.description: Default security policy baseline — customize to your business requirements

seeds.value: API keys: 90 days. Database passwords: 90 days. TLS certificates: 365 days. OAuth client secrets: 180 days.
